scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && (test -x .venv/bin/python && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 || python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000)
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
